agentStop.powershell: $script = if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($env:COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT)) { $null } else { Join-Path $env:COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT 'drain-hook.ps1' }; if ($script -and (Test-Path -LiteralPath $script -PathType Leaf)) { & $script } else { '{"decision":"block","reason":"Telex plugin installation is incomplete: the drain hook launcher is unavailable. Reinstall the telex plugin from a matched release, then restart Copilot."}' }
agentStop.bash: if [ -n "${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] && [ -f "$COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT/drain-hook.sh" ]; then sh "$COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT/drain-hook.sh"; else printf '%s\n' '{"decision":"block","reason":"Telex plugin installation is incomplete: the drain hook launcher is unavailable. Reinstall the telex plugin from a matched release, then restart Copilot."}'; fi
